items.title: Park Street — Wine & Spirits Distribution Platform
items.subtitle: Beverage Inventory Management System
items.role: Senior Software Engineer / Team Lead | Pricing Module Owner
items.description: Developed and maintained a large-scale SaaS Beverage Inventory Management Platform for the wine and spirits distribution industry, supporting inventory management, pricing, procurement, and distribution operations. Led a team of 5 developers while taking full ownership of the Pricing Module.
contributions: Designed and developed scalable microservices and high-performance REST APIs using Symfony and Laravel Lumen.
Architected and maintained the Pricing Module, handling complex pricing rules, promotions, discounts, and customer-specific pricing strategies.
Implemented asynchronous processing using Redis, AWS SQS, and AWS Lambda to improve system scalability and performance.
Optimized database queries, API performance, and application architecture to support high-volume transactions and enterprise-scale workloads.
Integrated third-party services and collaborated with QA, Product, and DevOps teams to ensure reliable deployments and production stability.
Led sprint planning, code reviews, technical design discussions, mentoring, and production releases while driving engineering best practices.

items.title: Quality Audit Tool
items.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS Quality Audit Management Platform
items.client: Airtel, VI, Porter, Hotstar, TATA AIA, Mama Money & more
items.role: Sole Developer (2 Years) → Team Lead (2 Years)
items.description: Developed and scaled a multi-tenant SaaS Quality Audit Management Platform used by 2,000+ auditors for conducting field audits, inspections, surveys, and compliance assessments across multiple enterprise clients.
contributions: Designed and developed scalable modules for audit management, survey forms, task assignment, workflow automation, reporting, dashboards, notifications, and RBAC.
Built secure REST APIs and integrated third-party services for seamless data exchange.
Optimized MySQL queries, application performance, and backend architecture to support high-volume concurrent users.
Implemented queue-based background jobs, caching, and automated scheduled tasks to improve system reliability and performance.
Led sprint planning, code reviews, mentoring, production deployments, and client support while ensuring code quality and timely delivery.

items.title: NPS Survey Tool
items.subtitle: Feedback Analytics Platform
items.description: Developed an enterprise Net Promoter Score (NPS) Survey Platform to collect customer feedback, measure satisfaction, and provide actionable insights through real-time analytics and reporting.
contributions: Developed scalable backend modules using Yii2 for survey management, questionnaires, response collection, customer segmentation, and campaign management.
Built secure REST APIs for survey distribution, response processing, and third-party integrations.
Implemented RBAC, automated email/SMS invitations, reminders, dashboards, and analytical reports.
Optimized MySQL queries and reporting modules to efficiently process and analyze large volumes of survey responses.

items.title: Performance Management System
items.subtitle: Enterprise HR Tool
items.description: Developed an enterprise Performance Management System (PMS) to streamline employee performance reviews, goal tracking, KPI management, and appraisal workflows.
contributions: Developed scalable REST APIs and backend modules using Yii2 for employee performance reviews, goal setting, KPIs, appraisals, feedback, and approval workflows.
Implemented RBAC, configurable review cycles, notifications, dashboards, and reporting modules.
Built performance analytics and reporting features to help management track employee progress and organizational performance.
Optimized database queries and application performance to ensure fast and reliable access to performance data.

items.title: AHA Social Media Platform
items.subtitle: Real-time Engagement App
items.description: Developed a scalable social media platform enabling users to create, share, and engage with multimedia content through real-time interactions.
contributions: Developed scalable REST APIs and backend modules using Laravel for user management, posts, comments, reactions, notifications, and media handling.
Implemented real-time one-to-one and group chat using Pusher WebSockets, enabling instant messaging and live notifications.
Integrated AWS Rekognition Content Moderation API to automatically detect and block inappropriate images and videos before publishing.
Integrated ImageKit for image optimization, CDN delivery, and media transformation to improve loading performance.
Optimized MySQL queries, application performance, and API response times to support a growing user base.

items.title: Collection CRM (NPA)
items.subtitle: Loan Recovery & Collection Tool
items.description: Developed an enterprise Loan Recovery & Collection Management System for managing delinquent accounts, recovery operations, and field collections.
contributions: Developed scalable REST APIs and backend modules using Laravel for customer management, loan accounts, payment tracking, recovery workflows, and case management.
Built modules for field agent assignment, collection visits, payment recording, follow-up scheduling, dispute handling, and MIS reporting.
Implemented RBAC, approval workflows, notifications, and audit logs to ensure secure and compliant operations.
Integrated third-party APIs for payment processing, SMS/email notifications, and customer communication.

items.title: Meri Bazar
items.subtitle: E-commerce Platform
items.description: Developed a full-featured E-commerce Platform for web and Android, enabling customers to browse products, place orders, and make secure online payments.
contributions: Developed backend modules using Core PHP for product catalog, categories, inventory, shopping cart, order management, customer accounts, and admin panel.
Integrated Razorpay and Paytm payment gateways for secure online transactions.
Designed and optimized MySQL database schemas and queries to improve application performance and reliability.
Built REST APIs to support the Android application and enable seamless communication between mobile and backend services.

items.title: Meri Shiksha
items.subtitle: E-learning & Online Exam System
items.description: Developed an online examination system for e-learning, enabling students to take exams and track results through web and Android platforms.
contributions: Built backend modules using Core PHP for exam management, question banks, and result processing.
Developed REST APIs supporting the Android application.
Implemented user authentication, exam scheduling, and automated grading features.

items.title: Online Job Portal
items.subtitle: Recruitment Platform
items.description: Developed an online job portal connecting employers and job seekers with profile management, job listings, and application tracking.
contributions: Built core PHP backend for job listings, candidate profiles, and application management.
Designed MySQL database schema for efficient search and filtering.
Implemented user registration, job posting, and application workflow features.
